selections.name: Classic Cara
selections.reason: Massive class drop from NY MSW/MCL ranks. Draws the inside rail on a tight turf course which is highly advantageous. Top speed figure fits perfectly here.

selections.name: Enchant
selections.reason: Consistent form and speed figures in the 104 range. Drops slightly in class and fits well with this group.

selections.name: Maizey Blue
selections.reason: Another NY shipper dropping in class. Has tactical speed to get a good position early.

selections.name: Munchkin
selections.reason: Solid class rating but draws a tough outside post on this tight turf course. Will need a trip.

danger_horse.name: Balitea
danger_horse.reason: Has flashed speed in the past and could be dangerous if left alone on the lead.

races.exotic_strategy: Win Bet #1, Exacta Box 1-7, Trifecta 1 / 5,7 / ALL

selections.name: Bee N Dee
selections.reason: Gets the aggressive jockey upgrade with local kingpin Paco Lopez. Fits the speed bias perfectly and should be sent early.

selections.name: Richie's Valentine
selections.reason: Draws well inside for a two-turn dirt route. Possesses strong early speed (100) which is deadly at Monmouth.

selections.name: Kathleen's Derby
selections.reason: Consistent runner with a 97 speed figure. Will need to overcome the outside draw but has the class to contend.

selections.name: Sexpectations
selections.reason: Holds the massive rail advantage in a dirt route. Can save all the ground and hit the board at a price.

danger_horse.name: Hipatia
danger_horse.reason: Inside draw and tactical speed makes her a threat for underneath in exotics.

selections.name: Ms Sophistication
selections.reason: Highest class rating in the field (109). Gets Paco Lopez in the saddle which is a massive upgrade on this speed-biased track.

selections.name: Saratoga Party
selections.reason: Chad Brown trainee with a strong 107 class rating. Must be respected despite the outside draw.

selections.name: Alma's Law
selections.reason: NY shipper dropping in class and gets the coveted rail draw in a two-turn dirt route.

selections.name: Tejanita
selections.reason: Classy shipper dropping out of tough MSW company. Has the back class to compete here.

danger_horse.name: Dark Blue Water
danger_horse.reason: Flashed a massive 107 speed figure but class disparity cap applies. Still a threat from an inside post.

selections.name: Azario
selections.reason: Paco Lopez takes the mount on a horse with the highest speed figure (107). Tactical speed will play well here.

selections.name: Elko County
selections.reason: Solid speed and class ratings (103/103). Draws well inside and should get a ground-saving trip.

selections.name: Royal Merit
selections.reason: Gets the rail advantage on a tight turf course. Has a solid 101 speed figure to work with.

selections.name: Mo Action
selections.reason: Good class rating (100) and draws inside. Should be in the mix late.

danger_horse.name: Navesink Pirate
danger_horse.reason: Consistent runner with a 98 class rating. Can pick up the pieces if the pace is hot.

races.exotic_strategy: Win Bet #6, Exacta Box 3-6, Trifecta 3,6 / 1,2,3,6 / ALL

selections.name: Grouch
selections.reason: BEST BET. Perfect storm: 'E' type early speed, rail draw in a dirt sprint, and Paco Lopez riding. Fits the Monmouth speed bias highway perfectly.

selections.name: Natural Harbor
selections.reason: Highest class rating in the field (105). Will be tracking the pace and gets first run if the top pick falters.

selections.name: Skylander
selections.reason: Solid 102 speed figure and draws well in the middle of the pack.

selections.name: Lord Berrier
selections.reason: Flashed a 106 speed figure but class disparity cap applies. Still a dangerous speed threat.

danger_horse.name: Charlie's Express
danger_horse.reason: Consistent 99 speed figure but draws outside in a sprint.

selections.name: Exclusive Champion
selections.reason: Strong class (102) and speed (107). Draws well enough to get a tactical spot early.

selections.name: Princess Gladys
selections.reason: Gets Paco Lopez which is always dangerous. Has a solid 105 speed figure.

selections.name: Lady Emily Kathryn
selections.reason: Rail draw on the turf is a big advantage. Has a 101 speed figure to utilize the inside.

selections.name: Singalong Kayla
selections.reason: Consistent 104 speed figure. Can hit the board with a clean trip.

danger_horse.name: Celestial Express
danger_horse.reason: Massive 115 raw speed figure but heavily capped due to class disparity (88). Still a threat from an inside post.

races.exotic_strategy: Win Bet #4, Exacta Box 4-7, Trifecta 4,7 / 1,4,6,7 / ALL

selections.name: Elsie's Smile
selections.reason: Paco Lopez takes the mount. Has solid speed and fits the aggressive jockey upgrade angle perfectly.

selections.name: Cassie's Vault
selections.reason: Highest class rating in the field (99). Will be closing late if the pace melts down.

selections.name: Lady Khoz
selections.reason: Highest speed figure (96) and draws well inside for a sprint.

selections.name: Toasttothestones
selections.reason: Good recent form and draws well. A logical contender for the exotics.

danger_horse.name: Securitylightning
danger_horse.reason: Has flashed a 92 speed figure and could surprise at a price.

races.exotic_strategy: Win Bet #5, Exacta Box 5-7, Trifecta 5,7 / 3,4,5,7 / ALL

selections.name: Magneto
selections.reason: Highest speed (111) and class (101) in the race. Draws perfectly inside to save ground on the tight turf course.

selections.name: Red Sky Morning
selections.reason: Gets Paco Lopez, but must overcome a detrimental wide draw on this tight turf course. Classy enough to do it.

selections.name: Roscommon
selections.reason: Solid 104 speed figure and draws well inside. Should get a great trip.

selections.name: Redemption Speight
selections.reason: Gets the rail and a jockey change. Has a 109 raw speed figure (capped due to class disparity) but the inside trip makes him dangerous.

danger_horse.name: Enduring Angel
danger_horse.reason: Solid 96 speed and 91 class. Can hit the board with a good setup.
